She really knows what she is doing. The place is spotless, the vibe is always good, and you leave feeling amazing every time. I highly recommend this spot to anyone looking for top notch IV services and great energy.

swifthealth-mobile-iv-therapy-and-housec.text: When my daughter became unwell close to midnight in NY the night before our journey home to Australia our travel insurance connected me to SwiftHealth. I arranged a virtual tele-health call and the Dr was fabulous. She quickly got the necessary history and reassured me we would be ok to travel. She arranged a prescription and then checked in several times including a few days later to ensure we were home safely and our daughter was doing ok. I was so grateful for her care and support. I’d have no hesitation recommending SwiftHealth to anyone.

I’m not kidding when I say Swift Health IV literally saved my life last week. I got a random food poisoning that made me go from fully functional normal day to puking my brains an dry heaving on my office floor.

There was no way I could drive my self to the nearest hospital, an it would have taken too long in this state to have someone come and take me . I knew I needed hydration period. I had nothing left in me. A friend of mine told me about this company that helped them with a hang over to get IV hydration therapy, and it popped into my head. So as I was almost dying I called SwiftIV and they had a nurse to my office with in 25min . I couldn’t believe it.

Nurse Pamela took great care of me , an with in 30min I felt half way back to normal. Sooooo freaking greatful with for this company and their services. After the IV I was able to function normal again an go about my day with some rest included. They also checked on me multiple times after the situation to make sure I was ok and back to normal.

Moral of the story, if you in need of quick come to you help or looking to feel your best, SwiftHealth IV and there team got your back!

There is no-one more knowledgable or patient then Aliza and the SwiftHealth Team! Aliza is available to answer any and all questions and support you or anyone in your house when they need the care and support! Aliza is so great that I worry less about illness because I know SwiftHealth will come to the rescue.

We’ve had the absolute best experience with Swift health for our family. Aliza makes herself available at all hours of the day and night. She sends the most amazingly attentive and caring nurses when she isn’t available herself. We are so appreciative of her incredible offerings.

First time using their services and I would highly recommend them! Thank you to Aliza for being so patient with all of my questions and for getting me on the schedule so quickly. The nurse Pam who administered my IV was so friendly and kind (especially considering I’m squeamish with needles). I appreciate you guys helping me out during a time where I was feeling really terrible.
Happy to report I’m already feeling much better!

healthy-living-liberty-lake-liberty-lake.text: I agree with the other positive review, Dr Ashley has been very focused on my health needs.  She listens to my concerns and proposes ways to improve my health with a focus on healthy living as a first priority.  That is why I went to her in the first place.  My blood numbers have improved substantially, largely without unnecessary medications.  I am very happy with the results!

Like others have say don’t even waste your time here. I called and the told me to call another number, left a message and also emailed for new patient appointment (before I really looked at the reviews) I never even received a call back 3 weeks later.  I’m glad I never got booked on a place like this. As a new patient coordinator at an office it’s really not that hard to follow up with patients.
Had my second appointment today at Liberty Lake Healthy Living. The staff were friendly and very personable! My nurse was beyond excellent! I will definitely go back.

I had been seeing Dr. Ashely for almost 2 years.  I would always have to schedule appointments weeks in advance.  Every appointment I would have to wait 30+ minutes to go into the back, and then another 15-20 minutes before I would see the doctor.  Even when my appointment was scheduled for 9:30am.  She did spend a lot of time with me during my visit, and I did feel she listened to me.  However I was looking for a doctor the favors Natural Medicine, and the Botox injection ads in the room made me question if I was in the right place.

What made me look elsewhere was how her staff treated my Mother, who referred me to this doctor.  After waiting for 7+ days for them to fill her hormone RX, and 2 phone calls to their office, she discovered she needed to be seen before they would fill her Rx.  Her office did not tell the pharmacy this, or respond to the refill request at all.  She had been out of her hormones for a few days when she finally reached the office.  Needless to say, she was upset and voiced her frustration the the person she talked with.  My Mom never yelled, cursed, belittled or called the person she spoke with any names.  She was just frustrated.  Later that week she received a letter stating that she could no longer be a patient at this Doctors office.  It was not on letter head and the signature was a stamp.  Evidently the person on the other end of the phone felt "Threatened"  and they have a 0 tolerance policy on threats.  So if you get upset because they don't return calls, don't respond to refill requested from the Pharmacy, and call to complain, you may be turned away as a patient.

I had a lot of health concerns and was hoping for a holistic approach that integrates mental health and was blown off. Contacting these people is incredibly difficult. Instead of suggesting anything remotely helpful, the 'doctor' suggested i buy a supplement from her other business made from cow hormones. They used my insurance to bill it as a annual checkup, but when I asked for refills on my migraine medicine I got the runaround for months.

vancouver-ketamine-infusions-vancouver.text: Absolutely amazing center instantly you’ll feel the energy walking through the door, very professional and great walk through of the experience. Wonderful ambiance and the team there is excellent to work with. Everything is custom tailored to your needs. Highly recommend to anyone.

I am 39 and have been attempting to find relief for my mental health concerns from the age of 6. It’s been a long road of trying a multitude of psych meds that ultimately caused far more harm than good coupled with facing extreme stigma regarding my condition from the very people that are tasked to treat it professionally. I’ve been misdiagnosed, dismissed, and made to feel worse in our traditional mental health “care” system more times than I can count. Then I found ketamine at a point that I felt I was very close to succumbing to my illness. The stress my brain put on my body was overwhelming and I was breaking down mentally, emotionally, and physically. Ketamine legitimately saved my life. It took continued work and several months of sessions, but I can now wake up and just live. It is quite remarkable. Beyond remarkable. The staff, Karl specifically, have created a space where I did not even once feel judged even on my worst day. This place has truly changed my life and I feel that I can finally live with hope for the future. I can’t remember ever truly having that feeling in my life before now. It’s like entering a new world. I world that I saw other people enjoying but was out of reach for me until now.

I have chronic nerve pain in my left foot due to a couple of back surgeries.

Carl has been amazing answering all of my questions. Probably at least a couple of hours. Phone calls in the past few weeks about what the session would and also he goes above and beyond for just recommendations for me and genuinely cares for me and wants me to get better
Due to a couple of reasons. I haven’t yet done the infusion so I can’t comment on that but if/when I do, I am definitely going to Carl as he seems the best.

My daughter has been receiving infusions at the Vancouver Ketamine Clinic and I am very impressed with the level of compassion and knowledge Karl and his team has. When we moved here I was worried we would not find a place where she would feel comfortable to go to every month. Well she has. My daughter has a port and following sterile protocol is way more important with a port than it is placing an IV. They follow complete sterile protocol and it makes me feel very safe knowing that.
Thank you Karl for taking such good care of my daughter,
Liz

The intake process with Karl is wonderful.  He's a very knowledgeable professional who really cares and knows his stuff.  He goes out of his way to make things easy for the patients I refer to the clinic.  Paperwork, explanation of process, procedures, medical education, patient safety, comfort, are just top notch.  I can't recommend this clinic more.

new-u-womens-clinic-aesthetics-kennewick.text:
I had such a wonderful experience at New U Women’s Clinic and Aesthetics! From the moment I walked in, the front office felt warm, welcoming, and genuinely friendly. Danielle made me feel completely at ease right away, which I truly appreciated.

Dr. Fidino was absolutely fantastic. She really listened to my concerns, took her time answering all of my questions, and was incredibly knowledgeable about Morpheus8. I never felt rushed, and I left my consultation feeling informed, confident, and genuinely excited about my upcoming treatments.

And I have to add… Dr. Fidino has the cutest, most well-behaved golden retriever puppy! I secretly wished he had attended my consultation because he is just the sweetest 😊

Thank you, New U, for creating such a positive and professional environment. I’m looking forward to my Morpheus8 treatments and highly recommend this clinic to anyone considering aesthetic services!

Dr Fidino’s New U Women’s Clinic weight loss program has made a significant impact in helping reach my goals. 55+ pounds!! Greatly appreciated always being greeted with such with welcoming smiles for each visit from all the staff team. NAD+ IV therapy with Abby which was a must have with boosting up my immune system and help with cell repair. Lastly, a big shout out to Danielle. You’re a rock star with all my Cell Sound Therapy treatments. Seen my before/after photos made me tear up. Love love love the slimmer look!! Am so happy of my transformation!!  Look forward to seeing you again.

I had an amazing experience with my facial treatments. The results exceeded my expectations, my skin looks smoother,  brighter, and more youthful. Dr. Rachel Fidino was incredibly knowledgeable, professional and made me feel comfortable and confident. Danielle Master Aesthetician, was wonderful, skilled, attentive and truly caring. The entire staff was warm and friendly from start to finish. I highly recommend New U Women’s Clinic & Aesthetics.

Before National Eating Disorder Awareness Week ends I want to thank New U and Dr. Fidino for all of their support on my journey to a healthy relationship with food and my body. Dr. Fidino took the time to understand my issues were beyond the number on a scale but more about deep rooted issue that spanned over two decades. A GLP-1 peptide has eliminated the noise that is usually so loud all day, every day. I have my life back and can focus on healthy eating habits without my brain telling me lies. Thank you Dr. Findino for caring about your patients and understanding all of the complex issues tied to disordered eating. For the first time in 20 years I feel healthy. The New U team has been incredible and shown a high level of compassion.

I love coming here. The atmosphere is welcoming, the staff (especially Piper) is incredibly friendly, and every visit feels relaxed and enjoyable. You can tell they genuinely care about their clients and take the time to make you feel comfortable and confident.

restore-hyper-wellness-issaquah.text:
Had to give 2- had a nightmare experience today.
One of the new employee didn't check or provide shoes for my spouse during their cryo chamber. Grave negligence. We are very disappointed. Niko the manager and staff acknowledged this and were supportive. But this is not to have happened at first place - things could have been very bad.

Great place. The gm assisted us with our first time full body cryo. She answered all of our questions and addressed all our concerns. Very helpful. The place is set up like a calming spa with a touch of medical. Very well organized and professional. We felt like we were in good hands from the moment we entered. They opened the store front for us about 10 minutes early because they saw us waiting outside. Thanks so much for the great experience!

What an amazing experience. Highly recommend for anyone seeking recovery or joint pain relief. My joints and muscles feel fantastic after a heavy 5 day workout week. The staff is very friendly and the manager Ryan was knowledgeable and explained things in a way that way easy for everyone to understand. I received services - compression therapy, cryotherapy 2:30 length, and a bit of stretching. I will definitely be back many more times.

The team was very responsive, quickly got answers to all my questions and the services they provide check all the boxes on what I was looking for.
There must have been some divine intervention or something leading me to Restore. I called the office at 4pm to ask about a specific brand of Vitamin C IV Therapy I was wanting and I was thinking it would be lucky if I could get them to special order it; the nurse let me know that I don't need to wait on a special order because that is the brand of Vitamin C they offer. I then found out there was an open appointment, I had my intake with the  nurse by 4:30 and soon after I was getting my first Vitamin C IV the same day. The office made me very comfortable with reclining chairs, heat for my arm and a blanket.
Today was my first visit and it exceeded my expectations.  The infra red sauna was amazing and Trevor and Sydney were knowledgable, kind and helpful!

access-iv-vitamin-lounge-boonton.text: This was my first time getting an IV and honestly didn’t know what to expect. Paul was so attentive and knowledgeable. He walked me through everything along the way and made me feel very comfortable throughout the experience. Great customer service is hard to find but this was stellar. I feel AMAZING. The trip to get there is absolutely worth it. Looking forward to the next visit.

This was my second time receiving NAD+, but my first time at Access IV Infusion Center & Vitamin Lounge, and I can confidently say I enjoyed this experience much more than my previous one elsewhere.

The lounge itself is spacious, extremely clean, and offers a wide variety of treatment options. From the moment we arrived, everything felt calm, professional, and welcoming. Paul took exceptional care of us—he took the time to sit down, review our health history, check our blood pressure, and thoroughly answer all of our questions. Throughout the entire visit, he consistently checked in to make sure we were comfortable and had everything we needed.

The chairs are incredibly comfortable and even come with cozy blankets. There were also snacks and drinks available, which was such a thoughtful touch during the infusion. Overall, the level of care and attention really stood out.

We will definitely be back! Thank you to Paul and the entire team for such a great experience.

I decided to go to Access IV Vitamin Lounge because I felt sluggish and needed a boost of energy.   Upon my arrival, I was happy to see there is plenty of on-site parking.  Once upstairs, the medical professionals greeted me with genuine warmth and confirmed what I previously chose from my online reservation which was the perfect formula for an energy boost and brain fog.  Every step from check-in, brief consult with their medical professional to the actual IV Vitamin infusion was smooth, reassuring, and refreshingly transparent.  I had B12, Glutathione, and Taurine vitamin infusion for energy and mental clarity.

The lounge itself is spotless and beautifully designed: soft lighting, soothing music, wall-mounted TVs and comfortable leather recliners made it easy to relax while my infusion did its work.

Most importantly, I felt the results. Within two hours of finishing, I noticed a gentle surge of energy and mental clarity that lasted the rest of the day, no jittery crash, just a steady feeling of overall wellness. The nurse even followed up with practical hydration tips to keep the benefits going.

If you’re on the fence about IV therapy, do yourself a favor and book a session here. I was initially hesitant because I was nervous about it.  But I'm glad I did and honestly should have done it sooner.  The staff’s expertise, the pristine environment, and the immediate benefits have made Access IV Vitamin Lounge my new go-to spot for proactive health and self-care.  I highly recommend this place!

I visited Access IV Vitamin Lounge because it was highly recommended by a friend.  I had the Glow and Grow infusion which is designed to boost the health of your hair, skin, and nails.  It is definitely worth it.  The medical staff were amazing as they were very friendly and informative every step of the way.  The lounge is very comfortable with a relaxing setting.  I'll be recommending to friends as well.

I recently had a fantastic experience at Access IV Vitamin Lounge! Setting up my appointment was a breeze; Paul made it incredibly easy and convenient. When I walked into the facility, I was immediately struck by how clean, bright, and inviting it was.

I was given a private room that felt so cozy, complete with a comfortable chair and a desk, allowing me to catch up on some work while I received my IV drip. The atmosphere was relaxing, making it easy to focus on my tasks without feeling rushed or uncomfortable.

Paul was truly exceptional. He started by checking my vitals and, after my IV was in place, he checked on me periodically to make sure I was comfortable.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and I left feeling rejuvenated. I’m already looking forward to my next visit!

manhattan-iv-therapy-new-york.text: Everyone at Manhattan Medical Arts is super helpful. I reached out to get copies of my labs via text and Christopher responded within seconds. Christopher was kind and courteous and sent me what was needed via email right away!

I've been going to this clinic for more than a year now. the staff are very professional and the providers spends time to talk and explains things to the patients. Their text message app is good as well makes it convenient if i need to ask something.
The staff is amazing! Super accommodating! My PA Crystal Chung is the best! So caring, she takes her time to go through everything ! Finally I found the place that truly takes care of me
I’ve been coming to this office for over two years and everybody has always been so nice and helpful! Crystal always gives me the best care when I go! Thanks team!
Christopher has been great over the phone, professional, responsive, and easy to communicate with. Appointments and questions are always handled smoothly.

mobile-iv-drip-new-york.text: Ishani was incredibly professional and arrived timely. She has a wonderful and articulate bedside manner & very polite. It was a wonderful first experience and she treated my dad who is 79 with multiple myeloma with the utmost care and focus. Thank you again!

I Arrived in nyc not feeling well I looked for a mobile IV place near me the booking process was fast and accommodating! Nurse IShani Arrived early and I couldn’t have been happier! I knew I was in good hands, she was very Kind I really enjoyed my experience with her she was so gentle with administering the IV. I got the flu rescue  IV bag and I’m already feeling better. thank you Ishani!

Joseph was absolutely incredible. He brought the IV directly to me when I really needed it and truly saved my day (honestly felt like he saved my life). He was calm, knowledgeable, and so attentive throughout the entire process. I felt immediate relief and was so well taken care of. I’m beyond grateful for him and can’t recommend Joseph enough

I recently used Mobile IV Drip when I was dealing with a migraine and mild dehydration, and Colleen was absolutely amazing. From the moment she arrived at my home, she was warm, professional, and incredibly reassuring. She walked me through everything, made sure I was comfortable, and checked on me throughout the entire treatment.

Colleen’s expertise and gentle approach made the whole experience so much easier. The IV worked quickly, and I felt noticeably better not long after she finished. Having someone so skilled and compassionate come directly to my home made a huge difference.

I highly recommend Mobile IV Drip, and especially Colleen. If you’re not feeling well and need dependable in-home care, she is truly outstanding.

I can’t recommend this service enough. I was a complete zombie after a ferocious bout of food poisoning. I wasn’t able to keep anything in my stomach and one of my clients suggested an IV… since I couldn’t move much, I googled mobile IV drip and Joseph showed up…

He mixed together a cocktail of vitamins, was super gentle, trustworthy, compassionate, and light hearted - made this entire experience actually really fun. Absolutely blown away! 10/10 would recommend! Ask for Joseph!!

Oh and I felt like a new woman within 5 minutes!!!

lifedripsiv-jersey-city.text:
I am leaving this review to warn others about the completely unacceptable service at Life Drips IV Practice in Jersey City. This was, without a doubt, a 0-star experience! My scheduled IV repair appointment was a complete failure, as the clinician was a total no show. I wasted time traveling to and waiting at the Base gym location only to be met with confusion. The most frustrating part was the response from the front desk staff at Base gym. They were utterly confused. The fact that front desk mentioned that this is not the first time the clinician has failed to show up. This happened multiple times!!

This indicates a profound and systemic failure in scheduling, communication, and basic professionalism!! How are they even practicing? How a business can operate with such a blatant disregard for a customer's time.  It's clear why their ratings on platforms like ClassPass are so low. I am now convinced that any top-tier reviews they possess are 100% paid for. Avoid this practice entirely. Save your money and, more importantly, save your time.
How are they still in business? Taking peoples money even though they are aware they do not have the products people are booking. Booked an IV and they didn’t even have b12.

Had a great experience! I did the Vitamin B12 shot. The doctors were very informative about how I’d feel afterward as well as when one should to get other shots and IV drips. The whole thing took no more than 20 minutes.

The only way this could have gone worse would be if I actually was allowed to get into my appointment. Showed up 5 minutes early to my appointment but someone walked up and was given my spot because the person working there has no access to the system that manages appointments. After waiting 20 minutes, I had to interrupt the session that was going on to tell them I have to be somewhere in 10 minutes and asked what recourse I could take. The person had no info and suggested I try tomorrow to get a walk in spot. Don't bother with this unless you have a flexible schedule or a high tolerance for chaos.

Just got another IV Revitalize from LIFE DRIPS this last Thursday and it did not disappoint! It’s been a week and I still feel it’s effects. I always get IV’s from this facility and they provide me with a significant boost of energy, clearer skin, and ultimate hydration! The area is completely sterile and the nurses are very well versed in providing wonderful patient service. I love this place and so will you (:

revive-wellness-kennewick.text: Revive Wellness is an amazing place, the team is incredibly friendly and makes you feel comfortable right away. Their services are top quality, the space is always clean, calm, and welcoming, and the location is very convenient with plenty of parking. They take the time to answer all your questions and make sure you feel supported and well taken care of throughout your entire treatment.
Always a wonderful experience!  I 10 out of 10 recommend Revive. The staff is amazing and the services are 10 ⭐️

So happy with the work Jessica does, the patience and kindness she has really makes one feel confident. Appreciate the information on skin care and their products. Wonderful experience and highly recommend !
Absolutely LOVE this place - staff is always amazing, so helpful, & extremely professional. I cannot reccomend this business enough- they are WONDERFUL!
Everyone there is so nice and welcoming and Nichole made it so nice and easy to get my procedure with the pellet done.

honey-glow-health-bonney-lake.text:
Tim is truly exceptional. From the moment I walked in, it was clear that he genuinely cares about his clients and prioritizes what’s best for them. He took the time to thoroughly explain how different peptides work, as well as the various filler and Botox options, helping me understand what would best address my individual goals.

What stood out most was his honesty and integrity. He doesn’t upsell or push unnecessary treatments, and his pricing is very reasonable. In fact, he actively looks for ways to help you save money while still achieving great results. It’s refreshing to find a provider who clearly values performance and patient satisfaction over profit.

Beyond his expertise, Tim is simply a wonderful person — charismatic, kind, and someone you feel completely comfortable around. I genuinely enjoy my appointments and would confidently recommend him to anyone considering treatment. Seattle people…he is worth the drive!!!

Tim and his team are amazing! His #1 priority is patient satisfaction, and he truly shows that every step of the way. He takes the time to listen, answer questions, and make sure you feel comfortable and confident with your treatment. You truly feel cared for.

I couldn’t be happier with my results and my overall experience working with him. I would recommend them to anyone looking for professionalism, expertise, and genuine care. If you’re on edge thinking about treatment, this is your sign to DO IT!

I always have an amazing experience at Honey Glow! The staff always makes me feel comfortable and at ease through every treatment I go there for. Tim is more than knowledgeable, and takes the time to explain every process and what to expect. The office is welcoming and offers a calming/ cool atmosphere. I highly recommend Honey Glow for all your self care needs - such a caring, professional environment!

Such a great experience! I felt completely comfortable and everything was explained so clearly. The laughs throughout the appointment made it even better, and he was so welcoming and personable with both my husband and me. I truly appreciated the professionalism and care.

Tim and the team at Honey Glow are top-notch. Tim is extremely knowledgeable and takes the time to explain what he’s doing and why, which immediately builds trust. You can tell he actually cares about doing things right, not just rushing people through or pushing product.

The staff is professional, welcoming and makes the whole experience comfortable from start to finish. If you’re looking for a place where expertise, honesty and quality matter, Honey Glow is it. Highly recommend.

lavie-skinthetics-wellness-spa-federal-w.text: LaVie is wonderful. Everyone is so kind and welcoming. My first visit was a consultation where they used a machine to analyze my skin. I thought that was very cool because I could see exactly what my skin needed and where my skin was doing well. From there I expressed my major concerns and they set me up with a plan. So far I've done a Glo2Facial with RF, XERF treatments, and Microneedling with RF. My goal is collagen production, and smooth tight skin with the main focus around my mouth and neck. My experiences have been wonderful, the ladies here have taken very good care of me. Thank you LaVie, I look forward to my next visit!

I recently visited LaVie Skin and Wellness Spa to get one of their wellness treatments and the experience exceeded my expectations. From the moment I walked through the door, I was greeted with a sense of calm and tranquility. The ambiance is immediately soothing, with soft music, elegant decor, and a welcoming aroma that instantly helps you de-stress.

The staff at the were exceptional. The receptionist was warm and helpful, guiding me through the service options, and my therapist was highly skilled and attentive.

Beyond the excellent services and professional staff, one of the most significant advantages of choosing this spa is their commitment to client accessibility. They are also a Women owned facility and LGBTQ friendl. Along with that I was pleasantly surprised to discover that they offer no-interest payment plans, making it much easier to budget for regular self-care treatments without financial strain. This flexible option really sets them apart and shows they genuinely care about you.The facilities are pristine and well-maintained, with comfortable waiting areas, luxurious treatment rooms, and excellent amenities.

Overall, LaVie Skin and Wellness Spa provides a top-tier wellness experience that combines expert care with fantastic client-friendly policies. Whether you're looking for a one-off treat or regular wellness maintenance, I highly recommend visiting them. Definately check out what they have on their menu. 10/10 going to go again.

I'll start with the pros: the staff is friendly, the atmosphere is pleasant and cozy.
Now about the cons:
I had experience with laser rejuvenation on a weaker device, the effect on the skin was stronger. I left with fair skin....
For 2 hours of work, the minimum tip was $88. Seriously?
And I also got the impression that prices are adjusted on the fly. I left there feeling like I was cheated.
During the consultation, I heard three different prices, as a result, I paid the highest of the announced ones and it is unknown whether there will be any results. I am unlikely to return and I cannot advise others

Leny has been in the business for quite a long time. My experience with her was amazing from the atmosphere, the attention to detail, professionalism to the service was top-tier. You can tell a lot of intention and passion she put into her work. If you’re looking for a wellness spa that actually delivers results, Skinthetics Wellness Spa is the place. Clean, professional and such a relaxing experience ✨ Highly recommend.

I’ve had Botox quite a bit and my forehead and 11’s are the best Ive ever had! Please please take your time to visit and schedule with her! Thank you Dr Nguyen

I went to Bella MD to get help with skin texture and  evening skin tone and very curious about microneedling. I had a great experience with them despite being very anxious about it. The lidocaine cream made the process painless. They explained every step of the treatment which made me feel reassured. A day later my skin started peeling slowly which took a little less than a week to complete and I was able to see smoother skin. Already got a couple treatments with them. Can't wait to continue working with them and seeing more results!

I had my first Microneedling at Bella MD Health and Wellness last week. Dr. Nguyen is knowledgeable, professional, and incredible attention to detail. She listened to what I told her were my areas of concern and recommended the right service. I highly recommend Bella MD Health and Wellness to anyone.

This medspa has the most accommodating and friendly staff. I had some trouble scheduling my first appointment because of my busy schedule, had to move things around a few times. They went out of their way to accommodate my schedule. By the time I made it in, the dr made me feel incredibly comfortable since I’ve never had anything like this done before (micro needling). She walked me through the whole process verbally to let me know what to expect. The procedure went by faster than I anticipated with no pain. She wrote down notes of which cream I should apply to my face and when. My face peeled as expected the next day but once the redness and peeling subsided, my face felt incredibly smooth and fresh. Will definitely keep coming back.

She was so great! She took her time and went over the plan for my skin care, short and long term. Alka ordered and used mesynchemal stem cells on me and injected them into my face, into my scalp and via IV into my blood, all at one time. I have since found out that none of these were approved by the FDA for cosmetic use and have had to take the arduous and horrific reaction my body had into my own hands and advocacy. I spoke to Alka for a year prior to going forward with this procedure. She tout the benefits and said she had “model” clients who do it and have amazing results and all she has seen are amazing results. Another nurse in her office also elaborated that she had it done and had great results by way, encouraging me to follow through with the stem cell IV.  Alka never took the time to VERBALLY go over the dangers or bad reactions that a patient could have. There was never a verbal one on one regarding that topic.  After Alka did this procedure on me, my life spiraled into the worst series of side effects I have EVER experienced and I am still battling with these to this day (I have had tons of procedures at many different places and this one left me in sheer hell). I have issues I’ve NEVER had before. My prior beautiful skin is now the WORST it’s ever been.  It is now sensitive, flushes all the time and my skin is weak and thin from constant inflammation due to her stem cell microneedle procedure and my reaction to the stem cell IV. After her procedure, I could no longer use any of my prior facial creams… permanently as it was THAT BAD.  My personal products I’d been using for DECADES now burned my skin so badly that it felt like a 2nd degree burn on my face!!! My body and central nervous system are now HIGHLY sensitive to so many things. I’m on multiple medications to control the flushing and sensitivities in my body (I was NEVER on any of this medications before nor had ANY of these flushing and sensitivity  issues). My face flushes and becomes inflamed on a regular basis, my skin burned horrifically for months to my horror post procedure. I was inflammAGING, not looking younger or better. This procedure has BRUTALLY turned my life upside down. After Alka did the microneedle on my face, she gave me the mirror and my face was screaming with red with marks all over it. I had a feeling at that moment that something was truly wrong. I reached out to Alka for help after months and months of suffering (I could not even go in the SUN for months and still have to be careful!!!!!!) and the only thing she could offer was a LOW HISTAMINE diet. I had to cancel a pre planned vacation because my skin was soooo bad. So bad that I cried for months but my TEARS WOULD BURN MY FACE!!!!!I have had to go to tons of doctors and specialists for help since seeing her. I went to her for years prior and thought I could trust her but I now know I was terribly wrong. I wish someone else would have written about their experience so I’d know to question or second guess what could become of my life, my looks and my health if I did that procedure (it’s very expensive and BRUTAL). PATIENTS need to be throughly informed of ALL potential outcomes and not just rushed through a procedure that could be LIFE ALTERING. Stop using cosmetic products that aren’t FDA approved!!! After reading the review about the Botox, I don’t even know WHAT she put in my body or if she was being honest and transparent. All I know is that NO ONE SHOULD EVER SUFFER LIKE THIS… EVER!!! I would not believe that Ali review on here before … but I do now!! I cried over this for MONTHS but I couldn’t truly let it out because my TEARS WOULD BURN MY FACIAL SKIN! Yes, it was THAT BAD!

It’s been one of the most impactful changes I’ve made for my health.
Alka is amazing! So happy to have met her. She knows her stuff and advised me well. So happy with my results!!

I decided to give it a try and contacted them, leaving a voicemail. Someone called me back promptly and answered all of my questions. She was very kind and professional—her name was Colleen.

I booked my appointment for the very next day, and Erica was my nurse. She truly impressed me—one stick and done. I am not a fan of being stuck multiple times, as that is usually a dealbreaker for me, but that was not the case here at all.

It has been about an hour since I left, and I feel amazing. I went straight to the gym and worked out feeling fully hydrated and energized. I will absolutely be returning and have officially found my go-to IV hydration location. Thus, I never leave a review unless I have visited a few times, but - I truly feel so amazing and here is my honest first impression review.

Thank you, Island Revive!

the-iv-method-spokane.text:

This is a wonderful place!  All of the treatments are extremely effective.  And you can't get better than the nurses that work here.  I have been coming here for a very long time and have never had a bad experience; nor do I believe that I ever will.  Great job you guys!

Great service. I got the athlete IV and i feel great. It has helped a lot with my workouts. Great atmosphere at The IV Method. The whole health and wellness center is awesome. My new go to spot in Spokane.

restore-hyper-wellness-kirkland.text: I visited Restore for an IV treatment, but my experience was unpleasant. The staff completed the entire IV in just 20 minutes, even though the ingredients I received — glutathione, vitamin C, B12, B complex, glutamine, and L-carnitine — should normally be infused over at least 60 minutes. As a result, I felt dizzy, extremely fatigued, and weak. I hope the clinic reviews their procedures and ensures safe infusion speeds in the future.

Signed up in November and was told I'd receive information about a military discount. After three weeks and three phone calls, I finally received an answer: their member discount is 30%, military is 20%, so no military discount applies. This policy was never explained at enrollment.

More frustrating than the policy itself was the runaround. Multiple promises that a manager would call. Claims that my phone "wasn't working"—yet it worked fine when they finally called today. Three weeks for a simple yes or no.

The services may be fine, but the communication and follow-through were unprofessional. Veterans considering this location should ask pointed questions upfront and get answers in writing before signing anything.

Truly thankful for the team at Restore Kirkland! Highly attentive, very clean and great friendly service!

Thanks to Nurse Michelle who always goes above and beyond with educating me on every visit!

I had an incredibly disappointing and frustrating experience at this establishment. I purchased a 10-session package for hyperbaric therapy, and not once did the chamber reach the correct pressure level. Despite repeatedly informing the staff, the issue was never resolved. The pressure never even reached 4 PSI — far below the advertised 1.3 ATA.

Every visit was plagued with issues: staff were unprepared, disorganized, or in meetings when I arrived (despite being told to come early). On multiple occasions, the chamber wasn’t ready, sheets were unchanged. Constant miscommunication and lack of professionalism made this a complete waste of time and money.

To make matters worse, when I requested a refund for the sessions I didn’t use due to their failure to deliver the promised service, they refused. I even offered to pay for the three faulty sessions I did attend, despite the pressure not being correct — and they still wouldn’t refund the remaining balance.

I’ve never experienced such poor service, especially for something this costly. I do not recommend this business and will be filing a dispute with my credit card company. Avoid at all costs.

I’m so happy to have found Restore.  State of the art equipment, knowledgeable staff, easy access and scheduling.  I’ve been there three days in a row and I feel amazing!   (Cryo, RL Therapy and Infrared Sauna)

divine-aesthetic-lounge-mill-creek.text:

I know I will be back for more treatments in the future as her prices are one of the most reasonable around.

She took the time to explain everything step by step, which made me feel very comfortable and confident throughout the treatment. I highly recommend Grace to anyone considering microneedling or PRP treatments! ❤️

What I love most is her holistic approach. She doesn’t just treat lines on your face — she cares about your overall well-being and how you feel walking out the door. She takes her time, listens, and you can feel the patience and intention behind her work.

JUST BOOKED MY CHEMICAL PEEL!!!

ivtology-staten-island.text:
Exactly What I Needed After a Tough Weight Cut

After finishing a brutal weight cut for my fight, I knew I needed to rehydrate properly and recover as fast as possible. IVTology absolutely delivered.

From the moment I walked in, Mr K was professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in making sure I got exactly what my body needed. He understood the stress a hard weight cut puts on you and tailored the IV to help me rehydrate, replenish electrolytes, and bounce back quickly.

Within a short time, I could literally feel the difference — clearer head, better energy, no lingering dizziness, and my body didn’t feel as depleted. By the next day, I felt strong, full, and ready to perform. The recovery was night and day compared to trying to rehydrate on my own.

Clean environment, smooth process, and top-tier care. If you’re an athlete cutting weight or just need serious recovery support, I highly recommend IVTology. They helped me show up at my best when it mattered most.

I’ve been to IVtology a few times and have had a wonderful experience each time. The office was very clean and the staff was friendly. I was unsure which trip to choose at first, however, I knew I wanted to focus on immunity during the busy holiday season. Kay was able to tailor the drip to my specific needs while keeping immunity at the forefront. I felt great each time after receiving the drip and it allowed me to stay energized throughout the holidays. I would definitely recommend their services!

First, I want to say K from IVTOLOGY is amazing. He is caring, kind, understanding, & listens to your concerns. I have inflammation in my spine due to herniated disc’s & spinal stenosis, with the pain shooting down my leg.  I went to Quhyn for my kinesiology appointment on Tuesday, I was in so much pain, Quhyn called K, explained my level of pain, & without an appointment K was at the office within 30 minutes. I never did IV therapy before, so I wasn’t sure what to expect. I did the RELIEF IV with GLUTATHIONE added to the IV. When I was finished I felt immediate relief. After a few days, I went back & had the RECOVERY IV, with a push of GLUTATHIONE.  I am in shock that I woke up today with no pain, & not having to taking pain meds. I’m sharing on Google because I’m sure there are others living with pain caused  by inflammation.
All I can say is, it works! The best part the office is immaculately clean!
Good luck to anyone wanting to help themselves & I’m forever grateful for K.

village-medicine-seattle-seattle.text:
I love Village Medicine. Dr. Kira Baum and Dr. Tiffany Jaramillo have been INTEGRAL to restoring my health. I predominantly work with Dr. Baum on gut health and Dr. Jaramillo on hormone health. They are incredibly knowledgeable and they take their time to understand me holistically before making recommendations. Their recommendations always feel spot-on and true to me. They have helpful tests that have made me understand my body a lot more and that data guides us when making decisions together. Albeit, the tests can be expensive because they're *sometimes* not covered by insurance. They also encourage me to continue seeing my UW providers and ask for me to share my UW results with them. It never feels like "us" vs "them" which I appreciate. Another cool thing -- with my consent, they will talk about my case together to brainstorm and make better diagnoses/recommendations. I feel like that almost never happens in healthcare! I've had mostly good doctors throughout my life, but these ones take the cake!

I agree with the other review that some of the front desk staff aren't very helpful. Although I've had other experiences that are totally fine. It really depends who you get.

Overall, I highly recommend Village Medicine. Particularly Dr. Baum and Dr. Jaramillo, but I imagine other providers are great too.

We had the absolute pleasure of being cared for by Nurse Hannah, and I can’t say enough great things about her! She was gentle, skilled, and incredibly attentive making sure we were comfortable and feeling okay throughout the entire experience. Her kindness and expertise made all the difference.

If you’re ever in need of IV care, Nurse Hannah is exactly who you want by your side. Thank you, Hannah, for such a warm and welcoming experience—you’re a gem! We will be back!

the-dripbar-beverly-beverly.text: Amazing! Very professional, clean and inviting space. The staff is very intelligent, thoughtful and caring. Plus I feel so much better than when I came in. Highly recommend for all sorts of remedies.

I had truly the best experience!  Ive gotten a lot of IV's in the past but I will never go somewhere else again! Adrianna, Kiera and Sam made me feel at home, at ease and took such good care of me.  Not only did I leave feeling so much better physically but I left with a smile on my face from meeting those ladies!! Trust me, go to here!!

This DRIPBaR is impressive. This place has so much to offer! I had such a great experience with my NAD drip. Camille and Derek were incredibly welcoming and kind. Derek was knowledgeable and answered all of my questions thoroughly. Very excited to go back!

DRIPBaR has quickly become one of my favorite places to reset and feel genuinely taken care of. The infrared sauna, halo therapy, and B‑12 shot were all AMAZING on their own, and what also stood out was how thoughtfully everything is done. Nothing feels rushed or transactional ~ it’s the kind of space where your whole system exhales the moment you walk in.

The environment is spotless and calm in a way that feels completely natural, and there’s a grounded, welcoming energy that makes it easy to settle in. Derrick and the team bring a depth of knowledge and genuine care that elevates the whole experience. They explain what they’re doing, check in without hovering, and create a space that feels personal rather than packaged.

I’m also really excited to be hosting a yoga pop‑up with them in February. It feels like such a natural fit ~ their commitment to intentional wellness pairs perfectly with the kind of practice I love to share. I can’t wait to bring people into a space that supports both physical reset and a little spark of joy.

If you’re looking for a place that blends high‑quality services with real human warmth, DRIPBaR is absolutely worth the visit and the memberships!🙏🏻🍒

I went to the Drip Bar and told the staff (who cared enough to contact me in their own personal time to accommodate me) that it was my daughter’s birthday, and i wanted to bring her to the drip bar for some vitamin therapy.   The man was so nice and very professional.  He instantly accommodated my needs.   Upon our arrival at the bar the following day, it was immaculate and extremely aesthetically pleasing.  We got a lovely tour which revealed all the amazing surprises that await; (sauna with sea salt spray, massages soon to come, the state-of-the-art facial machine, the privacy room, the soon-to-be botox/filler room, and the very impressive laboratory room, where they sterilize everything and create their custom vitamin blends!   When I thought it couldn’t get any better, they brought out a personalized cake (even with my daughter’s name on it) and a lovely card for her.  i got a fast doctor’s appointment to clear me for my drip, and the nurse that gave me the IV was beyond professional and also worked at Mass General!   The effects I got were so fascinating!  I felt so good!!  I felt refreshed, energized, and better than I had felt in a long time!  I cannot wait to go back, and highly recommend the drip bar beverly mass for vitamin therapy!

symmetria-integrative-medical-marysville.text:
I was going to go to this place but definitely changed my mind after doing some of my own research. There is NOT an MD on site.
There’s a chiropractor but no MD.
And I know some ppl are desperate for relief and they sure sound good in their seminar but that’s just it, it was this long drawn out sales pitch and there are no guarantees, so you spend anywhere from $2-6,000 dollars that ins does not cover, for something to try, I need more than an another try or hope at the place I’m at in life.
I need medical doctors who specialize in certain procedures. Take the stem cell rejuvenation they offer. You HAVE to be board certified with logs of how many procedures you’ve done and a degree in metabolic training and the stem cells themselves are not FDA regulated but the facility that they are kept in at just precise temperatures are federally regulated. You have to have all these different degrees in order to know safely and precisely where to inject the stem cells. And with all the vitamins and cocktail injections, you can buy those yourself for way way cheaper and do it at home. The “Blue” drink, is just a wash, there is no evidence to back it one way or another. This place has red flags all over it.
Just please do your homework and ask the right questions and put your eyes on some masters or bachelors degrees or even an MD who is accompanying a nurse who has also has extensive training. Put your money where it’s going to work and you’re not going to end up disappointed and out the money. Just do your homework ppl!!! Idk they might be right for some but with fibro, they are not right for me. Nor are they compliant with a ton of regulations. Good luck!

The team at Symmetria has been remarkable since my reaching out for service following a car accident. From the moment I completed my new-patient intake, I've been met with compassion, care, and outstanding service. Every team member is dedicated to the care of their patients, creating a positive healing environment, and making everyone feel comfortable at every step of their individual journey.

The expertise in treatment options is clear from recommendation through to execution, and I trust that each person treating me has my best interests at heart.

I highly recommend Symmetria for post-accident treatment and ensuring you're back on your feet as soon as possible. Thank you all!

I have been receiving treatment  on my left shoulder. I had an MRI to see what was going on. I have 2 tears. The rehab seemed to be moving slow and still on a lot of pain. Dr Haymour started working with me . He has me working with a squishy ball against the wall.Working on strengthening and getting my arm to be able to move with out so much pain. He has helped me so much. I am able to pull up pants up, I am starting to be able to pull my cover over me with my left arm. The seat belt possion is still painful. Closing the the door is getting better. I just can't express how much this has and is helping me.

These folks are the definition of exceptional.  I've been a patient now for a little on a month and every time I go in the front desk crew are incredibly friendly and always share a chuckle.  That's even before you get to the actual patient care which is top notch, it feels like every member of the team takes special effort to ask how you're doing, share in any milestones you've reached and just generally be encouraging, supportive, and informative!

Not that I'd ever wish anyone -need- their services, but if you're ever in doubt, this entire organization is exceptional.

I am a medically complex patient, chiropractic has become one of my pain management needs. I also have some life things and require female medical professionals. It’s hard to find female chiropractors. Dr Schuette is absolutely amazing. She knows her stuff and is also compassionate, a safe person, and determined to help any way she can. If something doesn’t work, we make adjustments until it does. I’ve also utilized Symmetria’s decompression and laser therapy in addition to chiropractic. I 100% recommend  Dr Schuette to anybody inquiring about chiro. I’m grateful to have found her, just wish it would’ve been sooner!

jubilee-clinic-dpc-marysville.text: Jubile is amazing. I feel great and can’t wait for my next session. Everyone needs to try this, seriously check it out. The benefits are endless! Also, there is a lot more room in the chamber than you would think. It’s kind of like I was laying in a two or three man tent:) Thank you for a relaxing and wonderful experience.

Today, I had my first hyperbaric treatment at Jubilee Clinic. My purpose for getting this treatment (and future ones) was to oxygenate my tissues for boosting my immune system.  They gave me detailed instructions on how to handle the session, even though I've had hyperbaric sessions elsewhere in the past. So, that showed me they have a good focus on giving me a safe and enjoyable experience! Since, phones are not allowed in the chamber, I just took a very restful nap. The hour went by quickly!

Had a lovely time receiving my first infusion. It was a super easy and relaxing process. The nurse was very friendly and informative. Apparently, I’m among the few who can smell the infusion—was like tasting a multi-vitamin 😂. Overall, it was a very pleasant experience and would definitely suggest this place for anyone interested in getting an immune boost for the upcoming autumn and winter season. Thank you for having me!

I recently visited Jubilee Direct Primary Care and had a wonderful experience! From the moment I walked in, the clinic felt warm and welcoming!  The staff took time to really listen, answer all my questions, and explained everything thoroughly! I especially appreciated the Direct Primary Care model with transparent pricing, personalized care, and accessibility! If you’re looking for primary care, I highly recommend Jubilee DPC in Marysville, WA!
Jubilee Clinic took excellent care of me. Just had my first immunity IV infusion. What a great experience and an amazing crew….including Ty, the golden doodle, who also has a beard. Thanks, all!!

ism-health-integrative-naturopathic-clin.text:
I've been going here for almost a year now and it is the best experience I have ever had in a doctor's office. Dr. Frances Lee, Dr. Isabella Merrill, and the receptionist Marty Peterson are always exceptionally kind, accomodating, professional, and just overall amazing! Incredibly welcoming environment where everyone smiles and greets you the moment you walk in and calming music with comfy furniture once inside, with water and tea waiting. Check-in is always so swift, I never even go up to the counter, because they know me the moment I enter the clinic and check me in within seconds.
This clinic has the highest quality treatment I've ever received in my life! I have a very complex medical profile and their responsiveness to my needs and concerns, attentive nature to lab results and my symptoms, and ability to maneuver and truly understand my needs are otherworldly! I've seen over a dozen doctors within the past 3 years alone, and ISM is by and far the best in every way. They don't throw prescriptions at you every chance they get, are never quick to diagnose because they always want to understand the bigger picture, and provide a variety of treatment options from simple breathing and exercise to medicinal over-the-counter supplements.
Dr. Frances Lee, who has been my primary care provider since I started going here in Jan 2025, has a sense of humor that eases the tension in the room that can come with medical concerns, is very encouraging of my progress, never irritable or curt, even when multiple treatment methods keep failing, and always asks questions, gets curious, and more creative whenever all else seems to fail. She always asks for my thoughts on any treatment plan she suggests, ensures my personal comfort with everything discussed, and goes out of her way to detail my visit summaries extensively because I have very poor oral memory.
I can't recommend them enough!! Some of the sweetest doctors (and people) you'll ever meet! You will be well-taken care of!

I have been wanting to take a different approach to women's health. Specifically thyroid and hormones. I met Dr Merrill, I LEARNED  so much from her in my 1st visit. I have already scheduled my 2nd appointment. The moment you walk into the clinic there is this calm peacefulness warm and inviting.  The front desk staff is ready and waiting for you very friendly and helpful. Thank you IMS for a beautiful clinic with amazing doctors and staff

I have had a fear of doctors since I was small but the staff here at ISM really helped me overcome that fear, especially Dr Merrill. She has a down-to-earth personality, so smart and yet humble, and is kind and considerate. She provides a safe space to work through health issues; I feel safe to bring up anything. I also felt heard and seen by her and be enabled to take charge of my health by having discussions instead of simply being told what to do. They have different kind of tests and solutions that I haven't seen anywhere else; it's a one stop shop. I haven't felt the need for and importance of PCP until I came here. The rest of the staff are nice, smart and friendly. I am always greeted by warm smiles and conversation whenever I come in.

Came here recently to get my covid vaccine and it was fast and easy. Jaime has great customer service and made me feel very comfortable while there. She also provides offers other services! From Vitamin B shots to Naturopathic visits. Definitely coming back!

Dr Jamie,
U R awesome. Laid back. Straight forward. No nonsense.
Dr. J gave me more information during a 30 minute CDL physical than I've received in the last 35 years. I'm definitely going back to Dr. J.

specialty-natural-medicine-lynnwood.text: By far one of the best experiences I have ever experienced when dealing with doctors. I felt welcomed, and comfortable going to Dr. Janel. I have gained so much knowledge and confidence in my health journey. Thank you! I will be back

I only got the nerve to write this after realizing what happened to me. I went to this clinic for weight loss help in the midst of the GLP1 craze and the pandemic. I was charged nearly TRIPLE for the medication in addition to the clinic visits. In my desperation, I didn’t realize there were other more affordable options (Zoom+ care). Also, I was charged $200+ for an appointment that I didn’t have. I was scheduled to see the doctor but had to cancel due to covid, and there was no substitute virtual visit. The assistant insisted I had the appointment and I owed the money. Then I got a letter threatening to send it to collections. I paid it because I was tired of fighting with him. This is also before I realized that UNPAID MEDICAL BILLS UNDER $500 DON’T AFFECT CREDIT SCORE. While the actual “care” at this clinic might be good for some people, the ethics certainly are not.

I have been taking my 2 sons to Dr. Lang for about 2 years now. She has been absolutely wonderful to work with. She is compassionate, knowledgeable and quick to answer all our questions. With her help, we have identified and worked to manage food sensitivities and digestive struggles. I brought my daughter in today for a consult and also had an excellent experience. We have done telehealth and in person appointments and always walk away feeling empowered in our health.

The front office staff, phone support and behind the scenes office staff have all been wonderful to work with. Michael is very detailed and helpful with all my scheduling questions and requests.

Just don’t waste your time. $425 for a 45 min appointment to only talk to the doctor for maybe 20 mins. Other time was spent waiting to come into the room or leave to put bloodwork in a different room. I’m sure there’s timing with all of that but I would have appreciated more time actually talk about symptoms and idk, having a conversation with the doctor. Was not personable just very in and out. Then on the way out was pushed into her “special” vitamin blend for other things we discussed and immediately looked around the room and noticed it’s just a lot of things for sale. Do yourself a favor and find a doctor who wants to help you without the first line of defense being”buy this”.

If you do decide to go you might as well skip the follow up $15 min zoom call. Basically read verbatim test results without giving any special information. Best to save another $300 if you want to.

Largely was very willing to pay out of pocket for what seemed like a very “naturopathic medicine” way and approach to my health but it was quite the opposite.

Caring, knowledgeable staff, & beautiful clinic. Dr Janel is very perceptive & after a thorough examination, was able to diagnose my issues & had very helpful alternative treatment recommendations. I am so thankful for relief from my symptoms! Kaela at the front desk was both friendly & accommodating, answering any questions I had readily & intelligently. Must also mention that  the office is beautiful! Very relaxing environment. Definitely feel like I am in good hands at Specialty Natural Medicine. Thank you for your wonderful care and expertise!

better-body-healing-aesthetics-centralia.text:
Natalie did the micro channeling procedure, I have to say it was a very good experience. At first I was a little nervous about the idea of the procedure, but I have to say in all honesty. IT DID NOT HURT!!!! Natalie is very professional and talked me through the whole procedure before we began, and then kept the conversation light and flowing. I was extremely relaxed throughout the entire process. After the procedure my face was slightly pink but back to normal color by the evening. I had a little peeling on my nose and forehead two days later, but nothing moisturizer couldn't handle. Overall I feel it did help my wrinkles around my mouth, eyes, forehead and neck. I do have a lot of age spots and do notice some lighter spots now. I will definitely re-schedule for another appointment in one month per her recommendations.
The staff at EVEXIA NW are the sweetest girls and every time I go in there they are friendly and seemed pleased to greet me.
The picture on the left was after the procedure and the right is before. You can see the difference between the wrinklesaround my mouth and neck.

I have been going to Evexia for quite a while now and they are so wonderful to work with. They genuinely care about your health and take the time to listen to your concerns. We are so lucky to have them in our community!
Natalie is very good. She is experienced and explains everything she is doing. She gave me great advice about improving the appearance of my skin. I won’t hesitate to book another appt!

Absolutely can't say enough wonderful things about Evexia NW! I love their staff, as they are helpful and friendly as well as knowledgeable. I have suffered from Chronic Lyme Disease, Chronic Epstien Barr Virus Major, hormone imbalances as well as Endometriosis. Their team has helped me so much and worked with my doctor's IV protocols to help me heal and find a renewed health. My favorites are the Biote bio identical hormone pellets, the NAD IV infusions and my high dose Vitamin C IV Infusions. Thank you Barb and Jen for your vision in Lewis County to bring health and healing naturally!

I have had the best experience here. They are very informative and knowledgeable. They listen to what you are going through and by the end you feel like you are in the right place. I went with the pellet therapy and it went flawlessly. Happy I found this place!

velvet-skyn-aesthetics-olympia.text: I wanted to try a laser treatment for my 59 year old face and decided to make a visit to Lisa.  She walked me through all the services and how much downtime would come with each one.  The entire staff there is amazing to be honest, personable,  helpful and makes you feel at ease.  I am very happy with my results and it gets better every week.  I look forward to going back for maintenance in the future!

I could not be happier and more enthusiastic about booking with Velvet✨
Velvet Skyn is a true gem in Olympia! From my first consultation with Kendra to my treatments with Montana, I’ve felt completely cared for.
Montana is so knowledgeable and thoughtful—she listens, tailors everything to my needs, and focuses on lasting results. The whole team is professional, welcoming, and never pushy. I always leave feeling confident and like my best self. Highly recommend booking a consultation—you’ll be glad you did!
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

I had been following Velvet Skyn on my socials for a while, and just loved their vibe. I decided to pull the trigger on some treatments and I am so happy I did. The office is beautiful and the staff at Velvet Skyn are so incredibly nice and accommodating. I met with Montana for my consult and instantly felt comfortable and at ease. Montana is always eager and willing to listen to my concerns and answer any questions I have (I always have quite a few). She also did a wonderful job with my treatments; I just could not be any happier with my results. I will be returning here and entrusting these beautiful and meticulously skilled ladies with my future skin care needs.

Had my first HRT appointment with Stephanie today at Velvet Skyn Aesthetics last week and it was a great experience! The whole staff was welcoming, the office feels comfortable, and Stephanie made everything easy to understand and stress-free. Excited to see the results and glad I chose Velvet Skyn!

I recently had an ultherapy chin lift at Velvet Skyn, and I couldn't be happier with the experience—thanks in large part to Lisa! From the moment I arrived, Lisa made me feel comfortable and well-informed about the procedure. She took the time to explain everything thoroughly and answered all my questions with patience and professionalism.

During the treatment, Lisa's expertise and gentle approach made the process smooth and virtually painless. She checked in with me throughout to ensure I was comfortable, which I really appreciated. The results are fantastic—my chin looks more lifted and defined, and I can already see a noticeable difference.

stryker-optimal-health-wellness-spokane-.text: Dr. Sara Stryker is absolutely amazing. She is incredibly knowledgeable, compassionate and takes the time to communicate clearly and honestly, which makes you feel completely comfortable and cared for. The receptionist was also very friendly and welcoming, creating a warm and positive experience from start to finish. Phenomenal care and outstanding service. I’m truly grateful and highly recommend Stryker Optimal Health and Wellness.

Sara is extremely helpful! I did functional lab testing with her and she spent an entire session reviewing the results with me. She walked through what everything meant and explained it in a way that felt clear and understandable. I left with actionable steps I can take to feel better and I feel much more in control of my health.

I saw Sarah for weight loss in December and want to start by saying both she and her daughter were incredibly kind. Her bedside manner is excellent, and I genuinely liked her.

I was prescribed a GLP-1 for three months and gained 12 pounds. I’ll be the first to admit I live a very sedentary lifestyle — I sit at a desk for 10+ hours a day and wasn’t very active during that time. However, my appetite was never suppressed at all, which was the main reason I sought this treatment in the first place. When I asked about adjusting the dose, I was told no. I chose to discontinue treatment, but was still charged $350 for the following month—despite it not having started yet.

It’s important to know that there’s a 30-day cancellation policy in the contract, so if you're not seeing results, consider canceling sooner rather than later if you’re thinking about switching providers.

Separately, my husband was on testosterone therapy at $125/month. It was on autopay for six months, during which he received only two vials and had no follow-up or check-ins. While I take responsibility for not tracking this more closely, I expected better oversight.

In total, we spent $2,682, gained weight, and received minimal medication. Since moving to another provider, I’ve lost 35 pounds in four months. While I still think highly of Sarah as a person, I found the experience disappointing and encourage others to carefully monitor billing, services, and progress throughout treatment.

Things to watch out for:

Auto-deductions: Monitor your account closely — charges may continue even if services stop.

30-day cancellation policy: Cancel early if you think you may want to stop — don’t wait until the end of the month.

Dosage adjustments: Be aware that dose changes may not be considered even if you're not seeing results.

Lack of follow-up: My husband received no contact or monitoring during the months of treatment.
Time was taken to listen to my reason for being there as well as thorough follow up on findings. Kind and compassionate staff. Highly recommend!!
Sarah is a God send!  She helps with your body issues, hormones , weight, etc., and she is confidential in nature.  What a great team they are in that office!!! Thank you!!!
